nasb.text: “And I will set My glory among the nations; and all the nations will see My judgment which I have executed and My hand which I have laid on them.

esv.text: “And I will set my glory among the nations, and all the nations shall see my judgment that I have executed, and my hand that I have laid on them.

cnv.text: “我必在列國中彰顯我的榮耀，萬邦必看見我施行的審判，和我加在他們身上的手。

ccb.text: “‘我要在各国中彰显我的荣耀，使他们看见我如何用大能审判歌革。
